Package i5.cb.workbench

Class TimeThread

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Thread
      • i5.cb.workbench.TimeThread

  • public class TimeThread
extends java.lang.Thread
    Class: TimeThread for CBIva
    Function: Updates every 60 seconds the time textfield of the Telos Editor.
    See Also:
    Thread, StatusBar, CBIva

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Thread

        java.lang.Thread.State, java.lang.Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static java.lang.String fix2​(int val)
      return a string consisting of the decimal digits of val; if the number has only 1 digit, a leading"o" is prepended
      static java.lang.String isoLikeTime​(int year, int month, int day, int hours, int minutes)  
      void run​()
      Function: Start the Thread
